name: pw-demo
description: Playwright Test Automation Framework with Page Object Model

scripts.test:with-allure: npm run allure:clean && npm run test:allure && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.clean: rm -rf test-results playwright-report logs allure-results allure-report
scripts.docker:up: docker compose up -d mongodb backend frontend || docker-compose up -d mongodb backend frontend
scripts.docker:test: (docker compose up --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from playwright-tests playwright-tests || docker-compose up --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from playwright-tests playwright-tests) && (docker compose down || docker-compose down)
scripts.docker:test:smoke: (docker compose --profile smoke up --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from playwright-smoke playwright-smoke || docker-compose --profile smoke up --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from playwright-smoke playwright-smoke) && (docker compose down || docker-compose down)
scripts.docker:test:regression: (docker compose --profile regression up --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from playwright-regression playwright-regression || docker-compose --profile regression up --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from playwright-regression playwright-regression) && (docker compose down || docker-compose down)
scripts.docker:clean: (docker compose down -v || docker-compose down -v) && docker system prune -f
scripts.docker:rebuild: (docker compose down -v || docker-compose down -v) && (docker compose build --no-cache || docker-compose build --no-cache)
scripts.test:local-with-app: npm run setup:demo-app && npm run docker:up && sleep 30 && BASE_URL=http://localhost:5173 npm test; (docker compose down || docker-compose down)
